dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes trend-following over counter-trend trades. Entry conditions enforce trend confirmation via price > SMA(50) > SMA(200). Counter-trend entries (short during uptrend/long during downtrend) are allowed only in weakening trends (ADX 15-25) but this is controlled via position sizing multiplier (0.5) rather than hard entry gate. Exit conditions use trend-line crossovers. Stop loss set to 1.5x normal (1.5% default). Original source emphasizes liquidating positions that align with trend direction quickly—this is captured in the trend-following bias of entry rules.

source_rule_text: A trader should avoid initiating trades counter to the prevailing trend, as they statistically underperform trend-aligned trades, despite occasional outlier successes.
